examples: Tasklets are built on top of softirqs to allow dynamic creation of deferrable functions.
Alarm Manager provides a list of the deferrable, non-deferrable, deferred, and unqueued alarms.
Deferrable participating loan a loan used by ifc whereby the interest paid is linked to the profits of the company.
Cruise lines suffer mightily in a recession, since vacations are a deferrable purchase, but come out of it roaring.
